era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 贝丘建造、近海捕鱼。
keyInnovations.en: Shell midden construction, nearshore fishing.

strengths.zh: 海岸资源稳定。
strengths.en: Stable coastal resources.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，无农业。
weaknesses.en: Small population, no agriculture.

outlook.zh: 贝丘文化将逐渐衰退。
outlook.en: Shell midden cultures would gradually decline.

description.zh: 南美贝丘采集者沿海岸建造贝丘遗址的采集部族。
description.en: South American Shellfish Gatherers were coastal peoples building shell midden sites.

ruler.zh: 巴托斯王朝末期君主或寡头执政团
ruler.en: Late Battiad dynasty monarch or oligarchic council

governmentForm.zh: 由巴托斯王朝向寡头共和制过渡中的希腊城邦，公民大会与贵族议事会并存，王权受到越来越多限制。
governmentForm.en: A Greek polis in transition from the Battiad monarchy toward oligarchic republic, with citizen assembly and aristocratic council coexisting as royal power faced increasing constraints.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由希腊公民、利比亚附属居民、外邦定居者和奴隶构成。公民权与土地持有紧密挂钩，希尔费翁（罗盘草）贸易利润惠及精英阶层。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Greek citizens, Libyan subject populations, foreign settlers, and slaves. Citizenship was closely tied to landholding, and profits from the silphium trade benefited the elite class.

rulingClass.zh: 巴托斯王族后裔、大地主公民贵族和希尔费翁贸易控制者
rulingClass.en: Descendants of the Battiad royal house, major landowning citizen aristocrats, and controllers of the silphium trade

succession.zh: 王朝晚期继承不稳定，政权正向寡头会议制转型。
succession.en: Late dynastic succession was unstable, with governance transitioning toward an oligarchic council system.

structure.zh: 政体处于君主制向寡头制过渡阶段，设有公民大会、贵族议事会和各类行政官职。城市行政效仿希腊母邦模式，兼管周边利比亚附属领地。
structure.en: The polity was in transition from monarchy to oligarchy, featuring a citizen assembly, aristocratic council, and various magistracies. City administration followed Greek mother-city models while also governing surrounding Libyan subject territories.

function.zh: 制定政策、管理财政、主持司法和外交。
function.en: Set policy, managed finances, administered justice, and directed diplomacy.

function.zh: 负责城防、公民军征召和边境安全。
function.en: Oversaw city defense, citizen army levies, and frontier security.

function.zh: 管理港口、征收关税和监督希尔费翁出口。
function.en: Managed the harbor, collected customs, and supervised silphium exports.

function.zh: 主持阿波罗神庙祭祀、泛希腊竞赛和城市节庆。
function.en: Oversaw Apollo temple rituals, pan-Hellenic competitions, and city festivals.

localAdmin.zh: 城市核心由市政官员管理，周边利比亚附属地由总督或代理人治理，港口区设有专门的贸易监察。
localAdmin.en: The urban core was managed by municipal officials, surrounding Libyan subject areas governed by governors or agents, and the harbor district had specialized trade inspectors.

legalSystem.zh: 以希腊法律传统为基础，辅以本地习惯法。公民争端由法庭审理，对利比亚附属人口适用不同规则。
legalSystem.en: Based on Greek legal tradition, supplemented by local customary law. Citizen disputes were tried in courts, with different rules applied to Libyan subject populations.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入来自希尔费翁出口税、港口关税、土地税、利比亚附属居民贡纳和市场交易费。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from silphium export taxes, harbor customs, land taxes, Libyan subject tribute, and market transaction fees.

religion.zh: 希腊多神教，以阿波罗崇拜为城邦守护信仰，辅以宙斯、德墨忒尔和利比亚本地神灵祭祀
religion.en: Greek polytheism with Apollo worship as the patron cult of the polis, supplemented by worship of Zeus, Demeter, and Libyan local deities

culturalAchievements.zh: 昔兰尼以医学研究、哲学（昔兰尼学派的先声）、优质马匹养殖和希尔费翁垄断闻名。其陶器和雕塑艺术融合希腊与利比亚风格。
culturalAchievements.en: Cyrene was known for medical research, philosophy (precursors of the Cyrenaic school), quality horse breeding, and its silphium monopoly. Its pottery and sculpture art blended Greek and Libyan styles.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系希腊语族，多利安希腊方言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Hellenic branch, Doric Greek dialect

philosophy.zh: 希腊理性探究传统正在扎根，将产生昔兰尼学派的享乐主义哲学萌芽，同时保留殖民地特有的实用主义和开放精神。
philosophy.en: The Greek tradition of rational inquiry was taking root, eventually producing the seeds of Cyrenaic hedonistic philosophy, while retaining the pragmatism and openness characteristic of a colonial setting.

writingSystem.zh: 使用希腊字母书写多利安方言和通行希腊文。
writingSystem.en: Used the Greek alphabet to write Doric dialect and common Greek.

gdpDescription.zh: 昔兰尼经济以希尔费翁（罗盘草）垄断贸易为最大特色，这种珍贵药用调味植物出口遍及地中海世界。马匹养殖、谷物生产和港口贸易也是重要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: Cyrene's economy was most distinctively marked by its monopoly on the silphium trade, exporting this prized medicinal and culinary plant throughout the Mediterranean. Horse breeding, grain production, and harbor trade were also significant income sources.

mainIndustries.zh: 希尔费翁采集与出口、马匹养殖、谷物种植、橄榄油与葡萄酒生产、制陶、医药制品与港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Silphium harvesting and export, horse breeding, grain cultivation, olive oil and wine production, pottery, pharmaceutical products, and harbor trade

tradeGoods.zh: 希尔费翁、马匹、谷物、橄榄油、葡萄酒、羊毛、皮革与陶器
tradeGoods.en: Silphium, horses, grain, olive oil, wine, wool, leather, and pottery

householdWealth.zh: 公民家庭财富以土地、马匹和希尔费翁贸易股份为主；精英家族控制大量地产和贸易利润。利比亚附属人口财富有限。
householdWealth.en: Citizen household wealth consisted of land, horses, and silphium trade shares; elite families controlled large estates and trade profits. Libyan subject populations had limited wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 以希尔费翁垄断和地中海贸易为核心的商业化城邦经济，辅以土地贵族制和利比亚附属劳动。
economicSystem.en: A commercialized polis economy centered on the silphium monopoly and Mediterranean trade, supplemented by landed aristocracy and Libyan subject labor.

source.zh: 利比亚附属贡纳与其他

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以阿波罗神庙和城市金库中的白银储备为主，另有希尔费翁库存和马匹等实物储备。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of silver reserves in the Apollo temple and city coffers, plus physical reserves of silphium stocks and horses.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策围绕维持希尔费翁垄断、港口贸易扩展和城市公共建设展开。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on maintaining the silphium monopoly, expanding harbor trade, and urban public construction.

description.zh: 按希腊方阵编制的公民重装步兵，装备铜甲、长矛和圆盾。
description.en: Citizen hoplites organized in Greek phalanx formation, equipped with bronze armor, spears, and round shields.

description.zh: 由昔兰尼著名的马匹养殖业支持的精锐骑兵。
description.en: Elite cavalry supported by Cyrene's famous horse-breeding industry.

description.zh: 从利比亚附属人口中征募的轻装步兵和弓手。
description.en: Light infantry and archers recruited from Libyan subject populations.

commanderInChief.zh: 由公民大会选出的将军或王本人
commanderInChief.en: A general elected by the citizen assembly, or the king himself

technology.zh: 采用标准希腊重装步兵战术，骑兵力量因当地优质马匹而尤为突出。防御依靠城墙和港口要塞。
technology.en: Employed standard Greek hoplite tactics, with cavalry strength especially notable due to local quality horses. Defense relied on city walls and harbor fortifications.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自利比亚内陆部族的侵扰、波斯帝国的潜在干预以及与迦太基在北非利益的冲突。
threats.en: Main threats came from Libyan interior tribal raids, potential Persian imperial intervention, and conflict with Carthage over North African interests.

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于昔兰尼城及其港口、周边农庄和利比亚附属聚落。希腊公民约占三分之一。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated in the city of Cyrene and its harbor, surrounding farms, and Libyan subject settlements. Greek citizens comprised roughly one-third.

socialClasses.zh: 巴托斯王族、公民贵族、普通公民、外邦人、利比亚附属民与奴隶
socialClasses.en: Battiad royals, citizen aristocrats, ordinary citizens, foreign residents, Libyan subjects, and slaves

allies.zh: 与希腊母邦锡拉和其他多利安城邦保持联系，与部分友好利比亚部族有互利关系。
allies.en: Maintained ties with its Greek mother-city Thera and other Doric poleis, and had mutually beneficial relations with some friendly Libyan tribes.

enemies.zh: 与利比亚内陆敌对部族和迦太基存在竞争，波斯帝国是潜在威胁。
enemies.en: In competition with hostile Libyan interior tribes and Carthage, with the Persian Empire as a potential threat.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护希尔费翁贸易垄断和地中海商业网络为核心，对波斯采取谨慎态度，与希腊世界保持文化和外交联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving the silphium trade monopoly and Mediterranean commercial networks, adopting a cautious stance toward Persia, and maintaining cultural and diplomatic ties with the Greek world.

era.zh: 古风时代晚期希腊殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 希尔费翁种植与加工技术、希腊式城市规划和建筑、先进的马匹育种、医学研究和阿波罗神庙建筑群。
keyInnovations.en: Silphium cultivation and processing techniques, Greek-style urban planning and architecture, advanced horse-breeding methods, medical research, and the Apollo temple complex.

strengths.zh: 希尔费翁垄断提供巨大财富，优质马匹支撑强力骑兵，希腊文化与制度提供治理框架，地中海贸易网络广泛。
strengths.en: Silphium monopoly provided enormous wealth, quality horses supported strong cavalry, Greek culture and institutions provided a governance framework, and Mediterranean trade networks were extensive.

weaknesses.zh: 人口基数小，对希尔费翁单一资源高度依赖，利比亚附属人口的不满构成内部隐患，远离希腊核心世界且孤立。
weaknesses.en: Small population base, high dependence on the single silphium resource, discontent among Libyan subject populations as an internal risk, and isolation far from the Greek core world.

outlook.zh: 只要希尔费翁供应持续且内部政治稳定，昔兰尼可继续繁荣；但资源枯竭或政治动荡将严重削弱其地位。
outlook.en: As long as silphium supply continued and internal politics remained stable, Cyrene could continue to prosper; but resource depletion or political turmoil would severely undermine its position.

description.zh: 昔兰尼是北非利比亚海岸的希腊殖民城邦，以希尔费翁垄断贸易、马匹养殖和医学研究闻名。
description.en: Cyrene was a Greek colonial polis on the Libyan coast of North Africa, renowned for its silphium trade monopoly, horse breeding, and medical research.

name.zh: 马赛利亚及西部希腊殖民地

ruler.zh: 六百人议事会与执政官团
ruler.en: Council of Six Hundred and board of magistrates

governmentForm.zh: 以商业贵族主导的寡头共和制城邦，六百人议事会为最高决策机构，下设十五人执行委员会和多名专职执政官。
governmentForm.en: An oligarchic republican polis dominated by a commercial aristocracy, with the Council of Six Hundred as the supreme decision-making body, a fifteen-member executive committee, and several specialized magistrates.

socialStructure.zh: 社会由希腊公民商业贵族、普通公民、外邦商人、凯尔特雇佣兵和奴隶构成。商业财富是社会地位的首要决定因素。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Greek citizen commercial aristocrats, ordinary citizens, foreign merchants, Celtic mercenaries, and slaves. Commercial wealth was the primary determinant of social status.

rulingClass.zh: 控制地中海贸易网络的希腊商业贵族家族
rulingClass.en: Greek commercial aristocratic families controlling Mediterranean trade networks

succession.zh: 执政官由议事会选举产生，任期有限。六百人议事会成员从富裕公民中按资产和声望选拔。
succession.en: Magistrates were elected by the council for limited terms. The Six Hundred council members were selected from wealthy citizens based on property and reputation.

structure.zh: 政体为成熟的希腊式寡头共和制，以六百人议事会为核心，下设十五人执行委员会处理日常事务。港口管理、殖民地协调和对凯尔特外交均有专职部门。
structure.en: The polity was a mature Greek-style oligarchic republic centered on the Council of Six Hundred, with a fifteen-member executive committee handling daily affairs. Specialized departments managed harbor operations, colonial coordination, and Celtic diplomacy.

name.zh: 六百人议事会与执行委员会
name.en: Council of Six Hundred and Executive Committee

function.zh: 最高立法与决策机构，下设十五人委员会处理紧急事务。
function.en: Supreme legislative and decision-making body, with a fifteen-member committee for urgent matters.

function.zh: 管理港口运营、征收关税、监督进出口贸易。
function.en: Managed harbor operations, collected customs, and supervised import-export trade.

function.zh: 负责城墙维护、海军舰队和公民军征召。
function.en: Oversaw wall maintenance, the naval fleet, and citizen army levies.

function.zh: 协调西地中海希腊殖民网络和与凯尔特部族的外交。
function.en: Coordinated the western Mediterranean Greek colonial network and diplomacy with Celtic tribes.

localAdmin.zh: 城市核心由市政官员管理，附属殖民点（如尼斯、安提布等）享有一定自治权但服从马赛利亚外交指导。
localAdmin.en: The urban core was managed by municipal officials; subsidiary colonies (such as Nice and Antibes) enjoyed some autonomy but followed Massalian diplomatic guidance.

legalSystem.zh: 以福凯亚母邦希腊法律传统为基础的成文法体系，以公正和稳定著称于古代世界。
legalSystem.en: A written legal system based on the Greek legal tradition of the mother-city Phocaea, renowned in the ancient world for its fairness and stability.

taxationSystem.zh: 收入以港口关税、贸易税、外邦人居住费和殖民网络贡赋为主。公民直接税较轻。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from harbor customs, trade taxes, foreign resident fees, and contributions from the colonial network. Direct citizen taxation was relatively light.

religion.zh: 希腊多神教，以阿耳忒弥斯为城市守护神，辅以阿波罗和雅典娜崇拜
religion.en: Greek polytheism with Artemis as the patron deity of the city, supplemented by Apollo and Athena worship

culturalAchievements.zh: 马赛利亚是希腊文化向西欧凯尔特世界传播的桥梁，引入葡萄种植和酿酒技术，其航海探索（皮西亚斯的前辈）和法律制度闻名于古代世界。
culturalAchievements.en: Massalia served as a bridge for Greek culture spreading to the Celtic West, introducing viticulture and winemaking; its maritime exploration (predecessors of Pytheas) and legal system were renowned in the ancient world.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系希腊语族，爱奥尼亚希腊方言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Hellenic branch, Ionic Greek dialect

philosophy.zh: 希腊理性探究和商业实用主义并存，强调法治、贸易伦理和与异文化和平共处的智慧。
philosophy.en: Greek rational inquiry and commercial pragmatism coexisted, emphasizing rule of law, trade ethics, and the wisdom of peaceful coexistence with other cultures.

writingSystem.zh: 使用希腊字母书写，同时向凯尔特邻居传播文字使用。
writingSystem.en: Used the Greek alphabet for writing, while also spreading literacy to Celtic neighbors.

gdpDescription.zh: 马赛利亚是西地中海最重要的希腊商业枢纽，作为希腊世界与凯尔特西欧之间的贸易中间人获取巨额利润。葡萄酒、橄榄油和希腊工艺品换取凯尔特锡、琥珀、毛皮和奴隶。
gdpDescription.en: Massalia was the most important Greek commercial hub in the western Mediterranean, earning enormous profits as a trade intermediary between the Greek world and Celtic Western Europe. Wine, olive oil, and Greek manufactures were exchanged for Celtic tin, amber, furs, and slaves.

mainIndustries.zh: 中转贸易、造船、葡萄种植与酿酒、橄榄油生产、渔业、制陶与金属加工
mainIndustries.en: Transit trade, shipbuilding, viticulture and winemaking, olive oil production, fishing, pottery, and metalworking

tradeGoods.zh: 希腊葡萄酒、橄榄油、陶器、金属器、锡、琥珀、毛皮、奴隶与谷物
tradeGoods.en: Greek wine, olive oil, pottery, metalware, tin, amber, furs, slaves, and grain

householdWealth.zh: 公民家庭财富以贸易投资、船舶股份和城内房产为主；贵族商人家族控制贸易网络和殖民地利益。
householdWealth.en: Citizen household wealth consisted of trade investments, ship shares, and urban property; aristocratic merchant families controlled trade networks and colonial interests.

economicSystem.zh: 以海上中转贸易为核心的高度商业化城邦经济，辅以殖民网络和与凯尔特内陆的交换体系。
economicSystem.en: A highly commercialized polis economy centered on maritime transit trade, supplemented by a colonial network and exchange system with the Celtic interior.

source.zh: 外邦人居住费与市场费

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以城市金库和阿耳忒弥斯神庙储备为主，白银、贸易物资和海军储备构成主要资产。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury consisted mainly of the city coffers and Artemis temple reserves, with silver, trade goods, and naval stores as primary assets.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政以维持海军力量、港口扩建和殖民网络为优先，通过轻税和法治吸引外邦商人。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized naval strength, harbor expansion, and the colonial network, attracting foreign merchants through light taxation and rule of law.

description.zh: 按希腊方阵编制的公民步兵，装备标准希腊重装。
description.en: Citizen infantry in Greek phalanx formation, equipped with standard Greek heavy arms.

description.zh: 配备三列桨战舰和商业护航舰的海军力量，是马赛利亚军事核心。
description.en: Naval force equipped with triremes and merchant escort vessels, forming Massalia's military core.

name.zh: 凯尔特雇佣兵与辅助兵

description.zh: 从周边凯尔特部族雇佣的战士，补充城邦军力。
description.en: Warriors hired from surrounding Celtic tribes to supplement the polis's military strength.

commanderInChief.zh: 由六百人议事会选出的军事执政官
commanderInChief.en: A military magistrate elected by the Council of Six Hundred

technology.zh: 采用希腊式重装步兵和三列桨战舰技术，海军战术在西地中海领先。城防依靠坚固石墙和港口要塞。
technology.en: Employed Greek-style hoplite and trireme technology, with naval tactics leading in the western Mediterranean. City defense relied on strong stone walls and harbor fortifications.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自迦太基海军在西地中海的竞争、凯尔特部族的陆上侵扰和伊特鲁里亚海盗。
threats.en: Main threats came from Carthaginian naval competition in the western Mediterranean, Celtic tribal land raids, and Etruscan piracy.

populationDescription.zh: 人口集中于马赛利亚城市核心及其港口区，附属殖民点（尼斯、安提布、阿加德等）人口较少。希腊人、凯尔特混血和外邦商人构成多元人口。
populationDescription.en: Population concentrated in the Massalian urban core and harbor district, with smaller subsidiary colonies (Nice, Antibes, Agde, etc.). Greeks, Celto-Greek mixed populations, and foreign merchants formed a diverse populace.

socialClasses.zh: 商业贵族、普通公民、外邦商人、凯尔特雇佣兵、自由工匠与奴隶
socialClasses.en: Commercial aristocrats, ordinary citizens, foreign merchants, Celtic mercenaries, free artisans, and slaves

allies.zh: 与母邦福凯亚和罗马（早期友好关系）保持外交联系，与部分凯尔特部族建立贸易同盟。
allies.en: Maintained diplomatic ties with its mother-city Phocaea and Rome (early friendly relations), and established trade alliances with some Celtic tribes.

enemies.zh: 迦太基是西地中海的主要竞争对手，部分敌对凯尔特部族和伊特鲁里亚海盗也构成威胁。
enemies.en: Carthage was the main western Mediterranean rival, with hostile Celtic tribes and Etruscan pirates also posing threats.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护贸易通道安全、扩展殖民网络和在迦太基与凯尔特世界间保持平衡为外交核心。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on maintaining trade route security, expanding the colonial network, and balancing between Carthage and the Celtic world.

era.zh: 古风时代晚期希腊殖民地

keyInnovations.zh: 三列桨战舰建造、葡萄种植与酿酒向西欧传播、先进的港口工程、航海术和地理探索。
keyInnovations.en: Trireme construction, spread of viticulture and winemaking to Western Europe, advanced harbor engineering, navigation, and geographic exploration.

strengths.zh: 占据希腊-凯尔特贸易枢纽位置，海军实力在西地中海领先，制度稳定且法治健全，殖民网络提供战略纵深。
strengths.en: Occupied the Greek-Celtic trade hub position, naval strength leading in the western Mediterranean, institutionally stable with sound rule of law, and colonial network providing strategic depth.

weaknesses.zh: 人口基数小，陆上力量有限，过度依赖贸易利润，面对迦太基海军压力日增。
weaknesses.en: Small population base, limited land power, over-dependence on trade profits, and facing increasing Carthaginian naval pressure.

outlook.zh: 马赛利亚有望在西地中海贸易网络中长期保持重要地位，尤其在与罗马建立更紧密关系后。但迦太基的竞争和凯尔特内陆的不稳定是长期挑战。
outlook.en: Massalia was likely to maintain an important position in the western Mediterranean trade network long-term, especially after building closer ties with Rome. But competition from Carthage and instability in the Celtic interior remained long-term challenges.

description.zh: 马赛利亚是西地中海最重要的希腊商业殖民城邦，作为希腊世界与凯尔特西欧之间的关键贸易枢纽。
description.en: Massalia was the most important Greek commercial colonial polis in the western Mediterranean, serving as a key trade hub between the Greek world and Celtic Western Europe.

description.zh: 小亚细亚的伊奥尼亚希腊城邦在米利都的阿里斯塔格拉斯领导下起义反抗波斯帝国统治。雅典和厄瑞特里亚派遣援军支持，由此开启了波斯-希腊长达半世纪的对抗。
description.en: The Ionian Greek cities of Asia Minor revolted against Persian rule under the leadership of Aristagoras of Miletus. Athens and Eretria sent military support, igniting a half-century confrontation between Persia and Greece.

description.zh: 孔子离开鲁国，开始周游列国，向各诸侯推行其礼治与仁政思想。虽然始终未获重用，但孔子的教诲被弟子记录整理，后来成为影响东亚文明两千余年的儒家学说。
description.en: Confucius left the State of Lu and began traveling among the Warring States, promoting his ideas of ritual governance and benevolent rule. Though never given high office, his teachings were recorded by disciples and became the Confucian philosophy that shaped East Asian civilization for over two millennia.

description.zh: 罗马在公元前509年推翻了最后一位国王"傲慢者塔克文"，建立共和制政体。此后罗马确立了两名执政官共治制度和元老院权力体系，共和国开始与周边拉丁部落和伊特鲁里亚城邦争夺意大利中部的霸权。
description.en: Rome expelled its last king, Tarquinius Superbus, around 509 BCE and established a republican government. The dual-consul system and senatorial authority were codified as the Republic began contesting Central Italian hegemony with neighboring Latin tribes and Etruscan city-states.

title.en: Buddha Attains Enlightenment and Begins Teaching

description.zh: 悉达多·乔达摩在菩提伽耶悟道成佛，随后在鹿野苑初转法轮，宣讲四圣谛和八正道。佛教迅速在摩揭陀、拘萨罗等恒河流域国家传播，与婆罗门教和耆那教共同构成印度思想的多元格局。
description.en: Siddhartha Gautama attained enlightenment at Bodh Gaya and delivered his first sermon at Sarnath, teaching the Four Noble Truths and the Eightfold Path. Buddhism spread rapidly across Ganges states like Magadha and Kosala, joining Brahmanism and Jainism in the pluralistic intellectual landscape of India.

title.zh: 波斯海军击败伊奥尼亚
title.en: Persian Navy Defeats Ionians at Lade

description.zh: 波斯帝国海军在拉得岛海战中击败伊奥尼亚联合舰队，随后攻陷米利都城并予以严厉惩罚。伊奥尼亚起义的失败使波斯帝国把目光转向希腊本土的报复行动。
description.en: The Persian imperial navy defeated the Ionian allied fleet at the Battle of Lade, subsequently capturing and severely punishing Miletus. The failure of the Ionian Revolt turned Persian attention toward punitive campaigns against mainland Greece.

description.zh: 雅典军队在马拉松平原击退了大流士一世派出的波斯远征军，以少胜多取得了决定性的胜利。马拉松之战极大地增强了雅典的自信心和在希腊世界的地位，也证明了希腊重装步兵方阵的战斗力。
description.en: Athenian forces defeated the Persian expeditionary army sent by Darius I on the plain of Marathon, achieving a decisive victory despite being outnumbered. The Battle of Marathon greatly boosted Athenian confidence and standing in the Greek world, proving the effectiveness of the Greek hoplite phalanx.

description.zh: 吴国与越国在长江下游展开激烈争霸，双方反复交战。吴王阖闾在伍子胥和孙武辅佐下大举伐楚，攻入楚国都城郢，展示了吴国的强大军事实力。
description.en: The states of Wu and Yue launched fierce rivalry in the lower Yangtze region, fighting repeatedly. King Helü of Wu, advised by Wu Zixu and Sun Wu (Sunzi), launched a massive campaign against Chu and captured its capital Ying, demonstrating Wu's formidable military power.

title.zh: 大流士一世去世，薛西斯继位
title.en: Death of Darius I, Accession of Xerxes

description.zh: 波斯帝国大流士一世去世，其子薛西斯一世继位。薛西斯继承了父亲对希腊的复仇计划，开始筹备规模空前的远征军，准备彻底征服希腊世界。
description.en: Darius I of the Persian Empire died and was succeeded by his son Xerxes I. Xerxes inherited his father's plans for revenge against Greece and began preparing an unprecedentedly large expeditionary force to conquer the Greek world once and for all.

title.en: King Goujian of Yue Plots Revenge

description.zh: 越王勾践被吴国击败并忍辱称臣后，卧薪尝胆秘密复国。他任用范蠡和文种等贤臣发展越国经济与军事实力，为日后灭吴进行了长达十年的周密准备。
description.en: After being defeated by Wu and forced into humiliating submission, King Goujian of Yue secretly plotted his revenge, enduring hardship to strengthen his resolve. He employed capable ministers like Fan Li and Wen Zhong to develop Yue's economy and military, preparing meticulously over a decade for the eventual destruction of Wu.

title.zh: 温泉关与萨拉米斯海战

description.zh: 薛西斯率波斯大军入侵希腊，斯巴达国王列奥尼达斯率三百勇士在温泉关殊死抵抗。随后雅典海军在萨拉米斯海峡以巧妙战术击败波斯舰队，扭转了整个战局。
description.en: Xerxes led a massive Persian invasion of Greece. Spartan King Leonidas and his 300 warriors made their legendary stand at Thermopylae. The Athenian navy then decisively defeated the Persian fleet at Salamis through superior tactics, turning the tide of the entire war.

title.zh: 普拉提亚战役终结波斯入侵
title.en: Battle of Plataea Ends Persian Invasion

description.zh: 希腊联军在普拉提亚平原击败留守的波斯陆军，彻底终结了薛西斯对希腊的入侵。斯巴达将军帕萨尼亚斯指挥的这场胜利确保了希腊城邦的独立，开启了希腊古典时代的黄金时期。
description.en: The Greek allied forces defeated the remaining Persian army at Plataea, decisively ending Xerxes' invasion of Greece. This victory, commanded by Spartan general Pausanias, secured the independence of Greek city-states and ushered in the golden age of Classical Greece.

description.zh: 雅典主导建立提洛同盟，名义上为继续抵御波斯而联合希腊各邦，同盟金库设于提洛岛。该同盟实质上逐渐演变为雅典帝国的工具，为雅典的海上霸权奠定了基础。
description.en: Athens led the formation of the Delian League, nominally uniting Greek states against Persia with the treasury on Delos. The league gradually evolved into an instrument of Athenian imperial power, establishing the foundation for Athens' maritime hegemony.

title.en: Yue Destroys Wu, Goujian Becomes Hegemon

description.zh: 越王勾践经过多年准备终于灭亡吴国，吴王夫差自杀。勾践北上会盟诸侯，成为春秋最后一位霸主，但越国的霸权未能长久维持。
description.en: After years of preparation, King Goujian of Yue finally destroyed the State of Wu, with King Fuchai of Wu committing suicide. Goujian traveled north to convene a meeting of lords, becoming the last hegemon of the Spring and Autumn period, though Yue's dominance proved short-lived.

title.en: Rise of the Kingdom of Magadha

description.zh: 摩揭陀国在恒河流域诸国中脱颖而出，凭借铁矿资源、肥沃农田和战略位置逐渐扩张领土。摩揭陀的都城王舍城成为佛教与耆那教的重要传播中心。
description.en: The Kingdom of Magadha emerged as the dominant power among the Ganges states, leveraging iron ore resources, fertile lands, and strategic location for territorial expansion. Magadha's capital Rajagriha became an important center for the spread of Buddhism and Jainism.

description.zh: 迦太基在西地中海稳步扩张，控制了北非沿岸、撒丁岛西部和伊比利亚南部的贸易据点。迦太基以强大的海军和商业网络成为与希腊世界竞争的主要海洋强权。
description.en: Carthage steadily expanded in the western Mediterranean, controlling trading posts along the North African coast, western Sardinia, and southern Iberia. With its powerful navy and commercial networks, Carthage became the major maritime power competing with the Greek world.

title.zh: 薛西斯遇刺，波斯宫廷动荡
title.en: Assassination of Xerxes, Persian Court Turmoil

description.zh: 波斯帝国国王薛西斯一世在宫廷政变中被暗杀，其子阿塔薛西斯一世即位。宫廷内乱暂时削弱了波斯对西部行省的控制力，各地总督开始出现离心倾向。
description.en: Persian king Xerxes I was assassinated in a palace conspiracy, and his son Artaxerxes I ascended the throne. The court turmoil temporarily weakened Persian control over western provinces, with satraps beginning to show centrifugal tendencies.

description.zh: 在伯里克利的领导下，雅典民主制度进入成熟阶段，公民大会成为最高决策机构，陪审法庭和陶片放逐法保障了政治参与。雅典同时兴建帕特农神庙等宏伟建筑，进入文化的黄金时代。
description.en: Under Pericles' leadership, Athenian democracy entered its mature phase, with the Assembly becoming the supreme decision-making body and jury courts and ostracism ensuring political participation. Athens simultaneously embarked on grand construction projects like the Parthenon, entering its cultural golden age.

title.zh: 萨巴王国香料贸易繁盛
title.en: Sabaean Kingdom Thrives on Incense Trade

description.zh: 南阿拉伯的萨巴王国凭借乳香和没药的长途贸易积累了巨大财富，控制着连接印度洋与地中海的商路。萨巴人修建了马里卜大坝等水利工程，支撑了繁荣的绿洲农业。
description.en: The Sabaean Kingdom of southern Arabia accumulated vast wealth through the long-distance trade in frankincense and myrrh, controlling routes connecting the Indian Ocean and the Mediterranean. The Sabaeans constructed hydraulic works like the Marib Dam, sustaining prosperous oasis agriculture.

title.en: Six Ministers Dominate the State of Jin

description.zh: 晋国大权旁落至韩、赵、魏、智、范、中行六卿家族手中，国君沦为傀儡。六卿之间的权力争斗预示着晋国即将分裂为韩、赵、魏三国，揭开战国时代的序幕。
description.en: Power in the State of Jin fell into the hands of six ministerial clans—Han, Zhao, Wei, Zhi, Fan, and Zhonghang—reducing the duke to a figurehead. Power struggles among the six clans foreshadowed Jin's partition into Han, Zhao, and Wei, heralding the Warring States period.

title.zh: 萨珀特克文明蒙特阿尔班兴建

description.zh: 瓦哈卡谷地的萨珀特克人在蒙特阿尔班山顶扩建城市，修筑大型广场、金字塔和"舞者"石碑群。蒙特阿尔班发展为中美洲最早的真正城市之一，展示了复杂的社会等级和宗教制度。
description.en: The Zapotec people of the Oaxaca Valley expanded their city atop Monte Albán, constructing grand plazas, pyramids, and the "Danzante" stone slab galleries. Monte Albán developed into one of Mesoamerica's earliest true cities, displaying complex social hierarchy and religious institutions.

title.zh: 凯尔特人向东南欧扩张

description.zh: 拉丁文化的凯尔特部落从中欧向东南欧大规模迁徙，进入多瑙河流域和巴尔干半岛北部。凯尔特人的铁器技术和战车文化对当地色雷斯和达契亚社会产生了深刻影响。
description.en: La Tène Celtic tribes migrated on a large scale from Central Europe into southeastern Europe, entering the Danube basin and the northern Balkans. Celtic iron technology and chariot culture profoundly influenced local Thracian and Dacian societies.

title.en: Meroë Emerges as Iron Smelting Center

description.zh: 努比亚的梅罗埃王国发展为非洲重要的铁器冶炼中心，大量铁渣堆遗迹证明了其工业规模。梅罗埃同时是连接非洲内陆与红海贸易网络的关键枢纽。
description.en: The Meroitic kingdom of Nubia developed into a major African iron-smelting center, with massive slag heaps attesting to its industrial scale. Meroë simultaneously served as a key hub connecting interior African and Red Sea trade networks.
